description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly black exterior and a compact, angular design. The wings are sharply swept back and feature integrated engine nacelles, giving the aircraft an aggressive, high-performance appearance. Twin jet engines are mounted close to the fuselage, with additional underwing pods and visible weaponry or sensor attachments. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a streamlined canopy, suggesting a single or dual-seat configuration. The tail section features a distinctive twin vertical stabilizer in an H-tail arrangement, enhancing stability and control. The landing gear is visible and appears to be a tricycle configuration, with a prominent nose wheel and two main gear units under the wings.
description: A black, angular airplane with swept-back wings, twin jet engines, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. Features an H-tail and tricycle landing gear, giving it a modern, tactical look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the twin jet intakes, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, swept-back wings with underwing pods.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular fuselage, underwing attachments, and the H-tail configuration.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin engine exhausts, H-tail structure, and the full wingspan with visible landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the underwing pods, swept wings, and the streamlined fuselage profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with integrated engine nacelles and slight anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted close to the fuselage under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer connecting them.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units under the wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined canopy, likely single or dual-seat.
